description: Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its record-breaking spree, crossing Rs 1,000 crore net in India and achieving a worldwide gross of Rs 1,653.67 crore. Despite a slight dip on its 21st day, the film has secured a spot in the top 10 highest-grossing films globally for 2026, marking a significant international triumph for Indian cinema.

Sunjay Kapur's mother breaks silence after Priya Kapur removes her from RK family trust
description: Following Sunjay Kapur's death, his mother Rani Kapur is locked in a Rs 30,000 crore inheritance dispute with his widow, Priya Sachdev. Rani alleges Priya is trying to seize her late husband's assets and has been removed from the RK family trust. She expresses deep personal distress and fear, stating no settlement talks have occurred.

title: Mike Vrabel & Dianna Russini Drama Intensifies Over Scot McCloughan Affair
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and Dianna Russini of The New York Times have found themselves in major trouble after photos of them at an upscale hotel sparked outrage and taken the world by storm. The two were spotted relaxing together and sharing a hug which has convinced fans that they are having an alleged affair. Though both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have denied such rumors, an alleged old affair of hers has resurfaced.

title: Woman drives car into Indian-Australian man in racist attack in Melbourne
Anthropic CEO says AI will take your job;but his own company find enough people to work
description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning that AI could eliminate more than 50% of entry-level white-collar jobs within five years. But inside his own company, the picture looks different. Claude Code creator Boris Cherny says the software engineer job title is already dying — and Anthropic's Head of Growth says they can't hire enough PMs to keep up. The disruption isn't coming. It's already here.

title: Megan Thee Stallion recalls emotional moment amid Klay Thompson romance
description: The Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has proven his love and loyalty towards the popular Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, for close to a year of their high profile romance. While Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson seem happy together, the popular artist had gone through a lot in her life, including witnessing her mother’s brutal death in 2019.

title: Serena Williams shares rare Easter pics, opens up on motherhood journey
description: Serena Williams shared rare Easter photos with Alexis Ohanian and daughters Olympia and Adira, calling family time everything. She also spoke on Today about motherhood, her daughters’ personalities, and learning to balance attention between them. Her words and photos showed a simple, honest side of life after tennis, focused fully on family and everyday moments.

title: Assam polls SWOT analysis: Can Himanta retain power or will Gaurav Gogoi's debut shift the tide?
description: Assam's political landscape is heating up alongside spring festivities, with the BJP aiming for a solo majority against a resurgent Congress. Key contests include Himanta Biswa Sarma versus Gaurav Gogoi, while issues like identity, infiltration, and development shape the electoral battleground. Post-delimitation changes add another layer to this defining election.
